name: Italian Sausage with Grilled Onions, Peppers, Pineapple and Jalapeno
recipeIngredient: 4 large Italian sausage links, sliced in half lengthwise
1 large green bell pepper, cut into 1 1/2 inch wide strips
1 large red bell pepper, cut into 1 1/2 inch wide strips
1 large vidalia onion, cut in center and then in 1-inch slices
1 cup fresh pineapple, cut into large chunks
recipeInstructions:
Prepare a wood or charcoal grill and allow it to burn down to embers.
Toss the vegetables and pineapple in olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Grill for 5 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and the sausage is brown and heated through. Place in a small mixing bowl. Add pineapple juice and rosemary. Toss and season with salt and pepper. Serve over mashed potatoes.
